nodes.label: Scrape Ads
nodes.description: Pull competitor ad creatives from Meta Ad Library via Apify
sub_steps: Trigger Apify actor with competitor page URLs
Parse returned HTML for ad creative + metadata
Validate payload with Pydantic schema
Upsert raw ads to competitor_ads table

nodes.label: Extract Patterns
nodes.description: Analyze ad copy to identify hooks, angles, and CTAs
sub_steps: Fetch unprocessed ads from DB
Send to Claude — extract hooks, angles, CTAs, emotional triggers
Validate structured output against pattern schema
Upsert patterns to competitor_patterns table

nodes.label: Generate Hooks
nodes.description: Generate new ad hooks based on competitor patterns
sub_steps: Load relevant patterns + brand context
Few-shot prompt with top-performing examples
Generate hook variations via Claude
Score and rank output, store to generated_hooks table

nodes.label: Store & Serve
nodes.description: Save results to database and serve through the dashboard
sub_steps: Write to PostgreSQL via async queries
Serve via FastAPI endpoints
Dashboard renders competitor cards + generated hooks

nodes.label: Style Profiles
nodes.description: Extract visual DNA and style profiles from competitor creatives
sub_steps: Analyze competitor visual patterns (colors, layouts, typography)
Build style profile schema
Store profiles as reusable brand intelligence

nodes.label: Visual Gen
nodes.description: Generate ad creatives and thumbnails via FAL API
sub_steps: Load style profile + brand assets
Generate images via FAL API (~$0.10/image)
Output ad creatives, thumbnails, social graphics
